basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 22 June 2026 on the official website https://www.iitp.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD will be given as per the GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or Geotechnical Engineering or Civil Engineering or Soils and Foundation Engineering, B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with relevant experience, Minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks in B.Tech Civil Engineering
qualification.details: JRF: M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering or Civil Engineering or Soils and Foundation Engineering; B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering, Civil Engineering. Or B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with experience of 3 years in relevant areas. SRF: M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering or Civil Engineering or Soils and Foundation Engineering with more than 2 years of experience in relevant areas; Or B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with experience of 5 years in relevant areas. The candidate should have B Tech degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks.

salary_details.details: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA as applicable SRF: Rs. 41,000/- pm + HRA as applicable

selection_process: Email Application Submission Shortlisting Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Patna Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: JRF: M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering or Civil Engineering or Soils and Foundation Engineering; B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering, Civil Engineering. Or B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with experience of 3 years in relevant areas. SRF: M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering or, Geotechnical Engineering or Civil Engineering or Soils and Foundation Engineering with more than 2 years of experience in relevant areas; Or B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with experience of 5 years in relevant areas. The candidate should have B Tech degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD will be given as per the GOI rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA as applicable SRF: Rs. 41,000/- pm + HRA as applicable

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Email Application Submission Shortlisting Online Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF/SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions at IIT Patna is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for JRF/SRF posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions announced by IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for JRF?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need an M Tech/MSc/ME/ B Tech-M Tech Dual degree in Structural Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, Civil Engineering, or Soils and Foundation Engineering, or a B. Tech. in Civil Engineering with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for JRF and SRF?
faq.answer: The stipend for JRF is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus applicable HRA, and for SRF, it is Rs. 41,000/- per month plus applicable HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply by sending their complete application with all necessary documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT Patna JRF/SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF/SRF posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves email application submission, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Senior Research Fellow (SRF) at IIT Patna are on a contractual basis.
